MIDAS Visual Theme Tokens

A shared, blue-based MIDAS theme emitted as CSS custom properties, SCSS variables, TypeScript exports, MUI theme options, and machine-readable JSON.

Generated 2026-07-14T17:19:21.674Z License Apache-2.0 Pages base /midas-visual-theme/ Repository tokens.resolved.json midas-theme.css

Brand Blue

Chrome, links, and primary action scale.

Teal

Secondary and accent colours.

Cool Greys

Neutral scale for surfaces, text, borders, and chart furniture.

Semantic Roles

Application-facing colour roles. Apps should consume these names rather than raw hex.

Categorical

Fixed order for charts. Assign by entity, never by rank; fold tails into cat-other.

Sequential

Single-hue low-to-high ramp.

Diverging

Orange to neutral midpoint to blue.

Contrast Gate

WCAG 2.x ratios are generated from the same function that fails the build on regression.

Mode Pair Foreground Background Ratio Badges
light text/bg #12161b #f6f8fa 17.06:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
light text/surface #12161b #ffffff 18.16:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
light text/surface-alt #12161b #eef1f5 16.03:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
light text-muted/bg #616d79 #f6f8fa 4.97:1 AA pass AAA fail UI pass
light text-muted/surface #616d79 #ffffff 5.29:1 AA pass AAA fail UI pass
light link/surface #205487 #ffffff 7.84:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
light primary-contrast/primary #ffffff #205487 7.84:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
light danger-text/danger-bg #7a1f19 #fdecea 9.01:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
light warning-text/warning-bg #7a4900 #fdf3e2 6.87:1 AA pass AAA fail UI pass
light success-text/success-bg #14543a #e8f5ee 7.94:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
light info-text/info-bg #17406a #e9f1f8 9.30:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
light focus-ring/surface #5187be #ffffff 3.78:1 AA fail AAA fail UI pass
light focus-ring/bg #5187be #f6f8fa 3.55:1 AA fail AAA fail UI pass
light header-accent/surface #205487 #ffffff 7.84:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
light border-strong/surface #7c8996 #ffffff 3.57:1 AA fail AAA fail UI pass
dark text/bg #e7edf3 #0c1a2b 14.86:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
dark text/surface #e7edf3 #12263c 13.01:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
dark text/surface-alt #e7edf3 #17304a 11.43:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
dark text-muted/bg #9fb2c4 #0c1a2b 8.04:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
dark text-muted/surface #9fb2c4 #12263c 7.05:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
dark link/surface #7fb0dd #12263c 6.69:1 AA pass AAA fail UI pass
dark primary-contrast/primary #08131f #4e8bc0 5.14:1 AA pass AAA fail UI pass
dark danger-text/danger-bg #f2b8b2 #3a1a17 9.16:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
dark warning-text/warning-bg #f2d3a0 #3a2a10 9.61:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
dark success-text/success-bg #a8dcc0 #123a29 8.22:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
dark info-text/info-bg #a6c6e2 #14324f 7.38:1 AA pass AAA pass UI pass
dark focus-ring/surface #6ba0cf #12263c 5.52:1 AA pass AAA fail UI pass
dark focus-ring/bg #6ba0cf #0c1a2b 6.30:1 AA pass AAA fail UI pass
dark header-accent/surface #4e8bc0 #12263c 4.22:1 AA fail AAA fail UI pass
dark border-strong/surface #547a9e #12263c 3.40:1 AA fail AAA fail UI pass

Intentional non-gates: border/surface, chart-gridline/surface, chart-axis/surface, categorical fills/surface. These are decorative or data-viz furniture tokens; categorical fills must be paired with labels or patterns.

Chart Demo

Categorical colours are shown with labels, so meaning is never conveyed by colour alone.

  • Modeling 22%
  • Vaccines 18%
  • Mobility 14%
  • Surveillance 16%
  • Genomics 12%
  • Other themes 18%
